untranslatable_reason: This signal is a META-ANALYTICAL REGIME RULE requiring post-expiration cycle segmentation analysis by strategy type and sector with win rate and Sharpe ratio comparisons across multiple dimensions. It requires: (1) Trade segmentation logic not expressible in bar-level indicators, (2) Win rate calculation across segments (portfolio-level metric), (3) Sharpe ratio computation per segment (portfolio-level metric), (4) Consecutive cycle tracking (time-series portfolio analysis), (5) Sector classification and allocation opportunity cost comparison. This is a portfolio optimization and position sizing framework rule, not a price-action entry/exit signal. It cannot be reduced to single-bar indicator conditions using the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: SINCLAIR_DRY_6_0 is a post-trade analysis and regime identification rule for systematic strategy-sector combination evaluation. It should be implemented as a separate portfolio rebalancing module that: (1) Segments completed trades by volatility strategy type and sector, (2) Calculates win rate and Sharpe ratio per segment per expiration cycle, (3) Tracks consecutive positive cycles, (4) Compares segment performance vs allocation opportunity cost, (5) Dynamically adjusts strategy-sector allocation weights. This requires backtesting infrastructure for trade log analysis, not bar-level signal generation.
